q: In a camera, the ____ focuses the light from the object on the film.

The shutter speed is ___

For a farsighted person, the image of a near object is formed at a point ____ the retina.
For a farsighted person, the image of a distant object is formed at a point ____ the retina.
For a nearsighted person, the image of a near object is formed at a point ____ the retina.
For a nearsighted person, the image of a distant object is formed ____ the retina
The ____ opens and closes the eye.
The _____ is the coloured portion of the eye.
The ____ controls the amount of light energy entering the eye.
The _____ is the light-sensitive area of the cells.
The ____ can vary the thickness of the eyelens.
The yellow spot is on the ____
The yellow spot which is the most light-sensitive spot is ____
a: between the eyelens and the retina
